news.title: UW-Madison launches search for next director of athletics
news.summary_en: The process is being initiated by incoming interim Chancellor Eric Wilcots

news.title: Professor Emeritus John Ralph elected to National Academy of Sciences
news.summary_en: The honor recognizes his pioneering work to understand the biochemistry of an important binding compound in plants.

news.title: Universities of Wisconsin Presidential Search Committee, interim president named
news.summary_en: Amy B. Bogost, president of the UW System Board of Regents, has appointed a 25-member presidential search committee to help identify the next Universities of Wisconsin president. Bogost appointed Renée Wachter as the interim president of the Universities of Wisconsin.
